title: Duplicate card authorization
text: A duplicate pending authorization can appear if a payment retry occurs. Pending holds usually drop within 24-72 hours. Do not promise a refund until settlement is confirmed.

title: Business-tier shipping recovery
text: Business-tier customers are eligible for free expedited replacement when delivery is at risk and inventory is available in a regional warehouse.

title: Refund approval policy
text: Agents may recommend refunds under $500 for settled duplicate charges. Refunds over $500 or unsettled holds require billing review.
